case_title: WILLIAM HWONG et al VS. ALAMEDA COUNTY AUCTION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,600.13 FILED BY HWONG, WILLIAM HWONG, JANICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALAMEDA COUNTY AUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-01-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL *(JUDY CARRERA-OFFICE MANAGER)* FILED BY PLAINTIFF HWONG, WILLIAM HWONG, JANICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALAMEDA COUNTY AUCTION
